description: Redesign CTASection.tsx with vibrant gradient colors and animated inline SVGs to make the section more visually dynamic and engaging.
steps: Add CSS keyframe animations to app/globals.css for SVG animations (pulse, float/bob, rotate, spin-slow). Use standard CSS @keyframes since Tailwind CSS 4 uses @theme inline for custom values.

Rewrite components/landing/CTASection.tsx to include: (1) A more vibrant gradient background using purple, indigo, and sky blue colors instead of plain zinc. (2) Multiple animated inline SVG decorative elements positioned around the card - such as floating code brackets, spinning gear/cog, pulsing circles, orbiting dots, or abstract geometric shapes. (3) An enhanced CTA button with gradient background and hover effects. (4) Keep the existing AnimateOnScroll wrapper, heading text, subtitle text, and Link to /snippets. (5) Maintain semantic HTML with proper section, heading, and paragraph elements. (6) Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes for all sizing/spacing. (7) Use aria-hidden='true' on all decorative SVGs for accessibility.
Ensure the component still uses 'use client' directive and imports from next/link and AnimateOnScroll.
acceptance_criteria: CTASection.tsx contains multiple inline SVG elements with CSS animation classes applied
The gradient background uses vibrant colors (purple, indigo, sky, or similar) rather than plain zinc-900/zinc-800
CSS keyframe animations are defined for the SVG movements (float, pulse, rotate, etc.)
The component renders valid semantic HTML (section, h2, p elements preserved)
All decorative SVGs have aria-hidden='true' for accessibility
The existing heading 'Start Building Your Snippet Library' and link to /snippets are preserved
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-devhub and confirm it succeeds with no errors
Run npm run lint and confirm no linting errors
findings: Implementation complete. Added 4 @keyframes animations (float, pulse-scale, rotate, spin-slow) to globals.css. CTASection now has a vibrant purple/indigo/sky gradient background with 6 animated SVGs (code brackets, gear, pulsing circle, monitor, star, diamond). Button has gradient styling with hover scale effect. Build and lint pass.
